info.name: Awn API
info.description:
Complete Postman collection for the Awn Educational Assistant backend.

## Quick Start
1. Import this collection
2. Set the `baseUrl` collection variable (default: http://localhost:5000)
3. Run **Register** — tokens are captured automatically
4. Follow the Happy Path order inside each folder

## Auto-managed variables
| Variable | Set by |
|---|---|
| `accessToken` | Register, Login, Refresh Token |
| `refreshToken` | Register, Login, Refresh Token |
| `userId` | Register, Login |
| `documentId` | Upload Document |

request.description: Confirm the server is running. No auth required.
Create a new account. Tokens and userId are saved automatically.

request.description: Exchange the current refresh token for a fresh pair. The old token is immediately revoked (rotation).
Send OTP to authenticated user's email. In dev mode the 6-digit code is printed in the server console — copy it for the Verify Email request.
Submit the OTP. Replace the code value with what was printed in the server console.

request.description: Run AFTER successfully verifying email. Should return 400.
Request a new OTP. Subject to 60-second cooldown and max 3 resends/hour.

Upload a file for AI processing. Returns 202 immediately — processing is async.
⚠️ Email must be verified first (isVerified: true).

Full document including topics, summaries, and YouTube videos.
